name: Larry Thompson

contactInfo.office: 102 W. Austin St., Room 205, Jefferson, TX 75657

bio: Larry Thompson serves as the Marion County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Marion County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Jefferson area.
campaignPromises: Keep Marion County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
